title: SOL 48pk Jumbo Clothes Pegs, Extra Strong Large Plastic Laundry Clips for Washing Line, Assorted Colours with Soft Grip, Weather Resistant in Storm Conditions, Versatile for Clothing, Towel, and Jeans
features: Extra Large and Easy to Grip: Designed for convenience, our jumbo plastic pegs for washing line feature a large size and ergonomic shape that make them easy to grip, even with wet hands, ensuring a secure hold on your clothes without causing damage.

Heavy-Duty Durability: Made from robust plastic, our jumbo clothes peg for washing line or washing line pegs are built to withstand strong winds and heavy fabrics, ensuring your laundry stays secure on the line.
Weather-Resistant Design: These washing pegs or strong clothes pegs laundry pegs are designed to resist UV damage and adverse weather conditions, providing long-lasting performance for years to come

Versatile Applications: Perfect for all types of laundry, from heavy towels and jeans to delicate garments, making these plastic clothes pegs extra strong large pegs an essential addition to your laundry supplies.

Generous Pack Size: With 48 storm pegs or clothes clips in total 2 packs of 24, you'll have plenty to hang multiple loads of washing, making laundry day more efficient and less stressful with these clothing pegs

These pegs are made from robust plastic, ensuring they can securely hold heavy fabrics like towels and jeans, even in strong winds, without causing any damage. Are these clothes pegs weather-resistant? Yes, these pegs are designed to resist UV damage and withstand adverse weather conditions, ensuring long-lasting performance in all seasons. Can these pegs be used for delicate garments? Absolutely! These pegs have a soft grip and are versatile enough to handle everything from heavy items to delicate garments, keeping them securely on the line. How many pegs are included in this pack? The pack includes 48 pegs, split into two packs of 24. This generous quantity allows you to hang multiple loads of washing efficiently. Are these pegs easy to grip? Yes, the extra-large size and ergonomic shape make these pegs easy to grip, even with wet hands, ensuring a secure hold on your clothes.
